zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, United: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾萊坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Clifton於大約1279年出生在英國藍卡爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Sir Gilbert de Clifton39歲，母親Isabel de Aubigny23歲。他於大約1298年與Isabel de Huxley在英國爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: 英国英格兰藍卡爾萊坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Clifton于大约1279年出生在英国藍卡爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert de Clifton39岁，母亲Isabel de Aubigny23岁。他于大约1298年与Isabel de Huxley在英国爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Clifton was born about 1279, in Clifton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Gilbert de Clifton, was 39 and his mother, Isabel de Aubigny, was 23. He married Isabel de Huxley about 1298, in Clifton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1329, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Clifton est né environ 1279, à Clifton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert de Clifton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Aubigny, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Huxley environ 1298, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1329, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Clifton um 1279 in Clifton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert de Clifton 39 und seine Mutter Isabel de Aubigny 23. Er hat um 1298 in Clifton, Cheshire, England Isabel de Huxley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1329 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Clifton è nato il circa 1279 nel Clifton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert de Clifton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Aubigny, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Huxley circa 1298, nel Clifton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1329, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Cliftonが約1279年にイギリスランカシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert de Cliftonは39歳，母Isabel de Aubignyは23歳であった。約1298年にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンでIsabel de Huxleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Clifton(이)가 대략 1279년 영국 랭카실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert de Clifton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Aubigny(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 Isabel de Huxley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Clifton nasceu aproximadamente 1279, em Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert de Clifton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Aubigny, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Huxley aproximadamente 1298, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1329, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Clifton родился около 1279 г. в местности клифтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert de Clifton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Aubigny, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Huxley около 1298 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1329 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Clifton nació aproximadamente 1279, en Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gilbert de Clifton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabel de Aubigny, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabel de Huxley aproximadamente 1298, en Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1329, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
